attributes.name: esg_score
attributes.description: Overall ESG score from 0-100 based on environmental, social, and governance factors

attributes.name: environmental_score
attributes.description: Environmental pillar score (0-100) covering carbon emissions, resource use, waste management

attributes.name: social_score
attributes.description: Social pillar score (0-100) covering labor practices, community impact, diversity

attributes.name: governance_score
attributes.description: Governance pillar score (0-100) covering board structure, ethics, transparency

attributes.name: carbon_footprint_tons
attributes.description: Total carbon footprint in metric tons CO2 equivalent

attributes.name: carbon_intensity
attributes.description: Carbon intensity ratio (tons CO2 per revenue unit)

attributes.name: sustainability_summary
attributes.description: Brief summary of key sustainability initiatives and achievements

attributes.name: key_risks
attributes.description: Main ESG risks identified in the document

options.systemPromptTemplate: You are an expert ESG analyst. Analyze the provided sustainability document and extract accurate ESG scores, carbon footprint data, and insights. Base your scores on industry standards and the specific metrics mentioned in the document. Be precise with numerical values.

parameters.subject: ={{ $json.subject }}
parameters.message:
=Dear Recipient,

Please find attached your ESG & Sustainability Analysis Report.

Key Findings:
• Overall ESG Score: {{ $json.esg_score }}/100
• Environmental Score: {{ $json.environmental_score }}/100
• Social Score: {{ $json.social_score }}/100
• Governance Score: {{ $json.governance_score }}/100
• Carbon Footprint: {{ $json.carbon_footprint_tons }} tons CO₂e

The detailed report is attached.

Best regards,
ESG Analysis System
